name: rlm-tutorial
description: 从零到一实现一个递归语言模型（RLM）——VitePress 中文教学站点

scripts.demo:build: cd final-project/frontend && npm install && npm run build && rm -rf ../../docs/public/demo && mkdir -p ../../docs/public && cp -r dist ../../docs/public/demo
